mission.title: helm: Enable Release Namespace Creation in Helm3
mission.description: Enable Release Namespace Creation in Helm3. Requested by 61+ users.

steps.title: Check current helm setup
steps.description:
Verify your helm version and configuration:
```bash
helm version --short
```
This feature requires a working helm installation.

steps.title: Review helm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant helm configuration:
### Overview
`Helm2` provided support for the Release namespace `{{ .Release.Namespace }}` via `--namespace` option if the release namespace did not exist.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Enable Release Namespace Creation in Helm3
steps.description:
### Overview
Currently, in Helm3 there is no way to create Release Namespace during helm chart installation.

### Change
Implement functionality to support Release Namespace creation during helm chart install.
While this PR is marked as Proof of Concept (POC) - it attempts at a fully functional
```yaml
{{- if and .Release.Namespace (.Values.createReleaseNamespace | default false) -}}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  annotations:
    my-annoation: {{ .Values.MyAnnotation }}
  labels:
    release: {{ .Release.Name }}
    my-other-label: other-label
{{- end -}}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Enable Release Namespace Creation in Helm3" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
### Overview
Currently, in Helm3 there is no way to create Release Namespace during helm chart installation.

### Change
Implement functionality to support Release Namespace creation during helm chart install.
While this PR is marked as Proof of Concept (POC) - it attempts at a fully functional solution.
